jobs.description: Manage and oversee the city GIS program, supervise GIS staff, maintain GIS data/hardware/software, coordinate with IT and consultants; requires bachelor’s in GIS/CS/Geography/Urban Planning, 3 years municipal GIS management, 2 years supervision.

jobs.title: GIS Consultant/Project Manager
jobs.location: Washington, District of Columbia, United States
jobs.description: Bachelor's (5+ yrs exp) or Master's (3+ yrs exp) in a related field; experience implementing GIS solutions, managing small technical teams, familiarity with Agile Scrum and Waterfall, strong communication and analytical skills, willing to undergo government background investigation.

jobs.title: Project GIS Specialist
jobs.description: Bachelor's in a related field, 5+ years professional GIS experience, strong ArcGIS Pro and ArcGIS Online skills, experience with Field Maps/Survey123, spatial analysis, QA/QC, and environmental consulting experience.

jobs.title: Consultant, Environmental Engineer / Scientist / Geologist
jobs.description: Bachelor's in a related field or equivalent experience, 2+ years in environmental consulting, NJ regs knowledge, 40-hour HAZWOPER + 8-hour refresher, valid driver's license, ability to lift 40 lbs, MS Office proficiency, strong communication, field work required. No immigration sponsorship.

jobs.title: Senior Environmental Consultant Manager
jobs.description: BS in environmental engineering or science (MS preferred), 15+ years environmental compliance/permitting experience for complex power/industrial projects, familiarity with NEPA/ESA/Clean Air/Clean Water/RCRA, business development and project leadership experience, ArcGIS a plus.

new_jobs.company: Unified Government of Athens-Clarke County, GA
new_jobs.title: GIS Analyst/PW -Admin
new_jobs.description: Bachelor's in planning/public administration or related field with GIS coursework and 2 years GIS database design/implementation experience; valid driver's license; GIS/mapping, dashboard, research, training, and basic computer maintenance skills.
